question: Which peptide drug was among the first to be synthesized chemically rather than extracted from natural sources?
explanation: Synthetic oxytocin (Pitocin) was synthesized by Vincent du Vigneaud in 1953, earning him the Nobel Prize. It was one of the first peptides to be chemically synthesized for medical use. Insulin was initially extracted from animal pancreases; recombinant human insulin (Humulin) came later in 1982.
